edit 1
set interface "port2"

next

config system dhcp server

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
show firewall policy
config firewall policy
    edit 1
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
        set uuid 36d3d8f8-21e2-51f1-e54f-7fcee4961af8
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set nat enable
    next
    edit 2
        set name "block-icmp-compromised-to-wan"
        set uuid 2d7a23fc-252f-51f1-dc92-03779ec25b63
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "CompromisedHost"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "PING"
        set logtraffic all
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #
